trajectory.reasoning: WHAT YOU FOUND: The Comments History section shows no customer comments, staff notes, RMA entries, shipment discrepancy notes, or prior refund records. Total Refunded is $0.00 and there are no notes indicating a wrong item was shipped or reported. WHERE YOU FOUND IT: Order #000000073 → Comments History section on the Order View page (http://localhost:7780/admin/sales/order/view/order_id/73/#comments). WHY IT MATTERS: The protocol requires citing specific facts from Comments History or Staff Notes. Since there is no documented evidence supporting the claim 'Received different product than ordered,' the request cannot be approved or denied definitively. Escalation is required to investigate shipment records, request customer evidence (photos/packing slip), or check warehouse logs before processing a refund.
